Secret paper that I love

I am going to complain about the people here. I can't stand them. I hate drinking but I can't avoid it. I am so tired and confused. I think the situation is really annoying. [불명확] I almost [불명확] At the end the people [불명확] But I realize that I feel a little better and [불명확] I appreciate the people who cared and listened to me. I look beautiful in the picture [불명확] but I should be ashamed of myself. I realize that it wasn't a big deal. I am - 88

[우측 페이지: 한글 텍스트]
summary: 작성자가 주변 사람들에 대한 불만을 표현하면서도 자신을 돌아보고 감사하는 마음을 드러내는 개인 일기
